title: Poor Man's Mace
description: Adds an early game variant of the mace.
body:
A weaker, cheaper version of the mace balanced for early game. Crafted with a stick and an iron block replacing the breeze rod and heavy core respectively.

### Differences to the regular mace:
- Faster attack speed
- Half the durability
- Smash attack is replaced with increased critical damage
- Can't be enchanted with Density or Wind Burst
